title: Second project in Italy: Waga Energy advances waste-to-energy conversion in Tuscany, Italy
content: Waga Energy and Scapigliato, a waste management company for the municipality of Rosignano Marittimo in Tuscany, Italy, signed an agreement to produce renewable natural gas (RNG) from landfill gas. This is Waga Energyâ€™s second project in Italy. Under the agreement, Waga Energy will finance, build, and operate a gas purification unit on the site using its patented WAGABOXÂ® technology. The unit is scheduled to be commissioned in 2027 and will be operated by Waga Energy for an initial period of 10 years. The RNG will be injected into the local grid and sold by Waga Energy under a Biomethane Purchase Agreement.
author: Analysts Account
